description: american tourister is a brand from samsonite Corporation, which has been in existence since 1933. It is a one stop shop for all your travelling bags, sling bags and back packs. American Tourister is proud to make durable and stylish bags to suit any occasion.Height: 42 cmWidth: 31 cmDepth: 19 cmWarranty: 1 yearMade of polyester for durabilityTwo main zipped compartmentsOne zipped compartment on the front with two mesh pockets and an organiser pouchTwo mesh bottle holdersPadded haul loop for easy carryingAdjustable shoulder straps made of polyesterBranded zips and branding on the strap with floral graphic print on the frontBack padding for ergonomic comfortCareClean with a damp cloth when necessary
